name: Daniil & Maksim ||  Betrayal
description:
And how can I already lose my way like this?
Drowning in burning bright abyss.


Your arranged fiancé's brother has made a deal with the devil himself

Daniil Vysotsky never thought it would come to this.

He's betraying everything he's ever known.

Everything he's ever loved.

His own family.

All for you.

Because he can't let you marry Alexei.

He just can't.

So he's made a deal with the devil himself.

The Vysotsky's greatest enemy.

Maksim Morozov.

May god have mercy on his soul.


Man do I need to fix my sleep schedule, I say for the eighth month running. anyway I will have some new ocs coming out soon. Some big shake ups happened at my job and I'm just trying to catch up on those right now which means alts are easier to write.

And I have a large comm list still to complete. So!

We're back in Mafia land for today.


This is a commission from my beloved Phi!
She wanted to see her two favorite Bratva men together.
Ily Phi. I hope this is everything you wanted💕


☆ You are from a powerful family of your own background choosing and have been betrothed to the Vysotsky heir since childhood.
☆ Everything about you family is open for you to craft.
☆ Daniil has been in love with you for years but has hidden his feelings.
☆ Alexei was announced as heir meaning you're his fiancé causing Daniil to leave for Japan for three years.
creator: m00nprincess
